caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio, speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in front of a white background featuring a vertical column of gold stars and the words "EMPIRE HUSTLE" repeated. To his right, a screen displays a red logo with the text "BOSS TALK 101". Overlays on the bottom of the screen include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a black bar with the white text "CHECK IT OUT". The man is captured in a medium shot, facing slightly to the left while speaking. Across the sequence, he remains in the same position, with subtle shifts in his facial expression and head movement as he continues talking. The lighting is bright and consistent, focusing on the subject against the branded studio backdrop.
